node.html:
• Built and maintained the company website using React, TypeScript, and AWS (Amplify, Cognito, DynamoDB, S3)
  • Implemented authentication flows with AWS Cognito and dynamic data management with DynamoDB

• Streamlining university admissions across Africa with a unified, efficient, and transparent platform
  • Responsible for UAPPLY's full-stack development, including design and implementation of the platform's architecture using React, TypeScript, and Firebase

• Taught programming classes as requested by the instructor; managed late-afternoon and evening sessions
  • Set up demonstrations, supervised, and cleaned up after laboratory sessions where students built and programmed robots

• Resolved 25–40 tickets/week covering accounts, device setup, VPN, printing, and classroom AV
  • Performed Windows/macOS imaging and software installs; wrote standard operating procedures and knowledge-base notes

• Collaborated with an international team of interns to develop a time-tracking app using React
  • Assumed a leadership role, supervising five interns responsible for designing social media posts
• Improved Envision Rwanda's website (envisionrwanda.com) with custom HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to boost user experience

• Efficiently managed client accounts using Nexudus software in a dynamic coworking space environment
  • Ensured proper maintenance of Virtual Reality equipment in Westerwelle's Makerspace
• Taught CMU CS Academy, a Python course provided by Carnegie Mellon University, to students in grades 9–12
